hidden_mechanism: Search follows a diminishing-return curve, so high spend can look inefficient without implying that Search should be broadly cut.
expected_investigation: Compare linear spend evidence with nonlinear saturation evidence.
intended_reveal: Do not broadly reduce Search spend; tune high-spend marginal allocation.

hidden_mechanism: Social is materially more effective for Career Changers than Degree Seekers.
expected_investigation: Test Social spend by audience rather than using one pooled effect.
intended_reveal: Target Social investment toward Career Changers.

hidden_mechanism: Enrollment loss accelerates when processing delays exceed roughly 36 hours.
expected_investigation: Inspect processing delay and threshold behavior before blaming media.
intended_reveal: Improve operational throughput as the largest actionable intervention.

hidden_mechanism: Creative performance begins declining after roughly six weeks.
expected_investigation: Compare older and newer creative cohorts.

hidden_mechanism: Selected regional declines are caused by competitor promotions.
expected_investigation: Separate competitor-promo weeks from normal regional performance.
intended_reveal: Treat competitor pressure separately from channel quality.

hidden_mechanism: Regions differ in demand baseline and operating capacity.
expected_investigation: Preserve region as a baseline control.
intended_reveal: Do not treat all regions as exchangeable.
